---
title: "Ethics Package"
subtitle: "HREC Application and Supporting Documents"
format:
  html: default
format-links: false
---

This section contains the complete HREC application package for the study. All documents target Curtin's low-risk review pathway.

| Document | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| [HREC Application](hrec-application.qmd) | Full low-risk HREC application form |
| [HREC Narrative](hrec-narrative.qmd) | Supporting narrative |
| [Participant Information Sheet](pis-digital.qmd) | PIS for participants |
| [Consent Form](consent-digital.qmd) | Digital consent form |
| [Recruitment Materials](recruitment-materials.qmd) | Email and LMS recruitment text |
| [Facilitator Script](facilitator-script.qmd) | Lab session opening script |
| [Data Management Plan](dmp-summary.qmd) | DMP summary |
| [Risk Matrix](risk-matrix.qmd) | Risk assessment (low risk) |

::: {.callout-note}
Each document is available as HTML and DOCX. Use the download links on each page.
:::

::: {.callout-warning}
## Placeholders to fill before submission

- PI email/phone and Curtin HREC contact details
- Participating unit codes and names
- HREC submission date
- Storage location path
- RA position description
:::
